news.title: Your Art Can Go in This San Francisco Alley

news.title: A New Google-Funded Data Center Will Be Powered by a Massive Gas Plant
news.summary: Documents show that one of Google’s new data centers would be powered by a natural gas plant that emits millions of tons of emissions each year—an increasingly common trend in the industry.

news.title: Here's What Can Happen When the US Bombs Iran's Nuclear Sites
